meaning: n.(阻碍通道的)障碍物,栅栏,屏障
examples: I realized I had to surmount the language barrier.
The Yangtze river is a natural barrier to the north-east.
Ozone is the earth's barrier against ultra-violet radiation.
He is comfortably sized, barely cresting the five-foot barrier, shaven of head and broad of smile.
The existence of innovation-blocking groups has been and continues to be an important barrier to riches.
